features.name: Ki
features.desc: 2 Ki points. Flurry of Blows (2 unarmed strikes as bonus action), Patient Defense (Dodge as bonus action), Step of the Wind (Disengage or Dash as bonus action + jump distance doubled).

features.name: Unarmored Movement
features.desc: +10 ft speed while not wearing armor or shield.

features.name: Uncanny Metabolism
features.desc: When you roll Initiative, regain all Ki points and heal (Martial Arts die + Monk level) HP. 1/long rest.

features.name: Deflect Attacks
features.desc: Reduce damage from attacks by 1d10 + DEX mod + Monk level. If reduced to 0, can redirect.

features.name: Slow Fall
features.desc: Reduce falling damage by 5 × Monk level.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.desc: 2 attacks per Attack action.

features.name: Stunning Strike
features.desc: Spend 1 Ki: target must CON save or be stunned until your next turn start.

features.name: Empowered Strikes
features.desc: Unarmed strikes count as magical.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.desc: Varies by tradition.

features.name: Evasion
features.desc: DEX save success: no damage. Failure: half damage.

features.name: Acrobatic Movement
features.desc: Move along vertical surfaces and across liquids without falling (during movement).

features.name: Self-Restoration
features.desc: At end of each turn, end one: charmed, frightened, or poisoned condition on yourself.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.desc: Varies by tradition.

features.name: Deflect Energy
features.desc: Deflect Attacks now works against ranged spell attacks.

features.name: Disciplined Survivor
features.desc: Proficiency in all saving throws. Spend 1 Ki to reroll a failed save.

features.name: Perfect Discipline
features.desc: When you roll Initiative and have no Ki points, regain 4 Ki points.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.desc: Varies by tradition.

features.name: Superior Defense
features.desc: While you have Ki points remaining, you have resistance to all damage except Force.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.desc: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice.

features.name: Body and Mind
features.desc: DEX and WIS scores increase by 4. Maximum for those scores is now 25.
